name: timetable-viewer-and-optimizator
description: Web application to view, customize and optimize university timetables.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/optimizer/problem.js && node --check public/optimizer/engine.js && node --check public/optimizer/algorithms/index.js && node --check public/optimizer/algorithms/random-search.js && node --check public/optimizer/algorithms/hill-climbing.js && node --check public/optimizer/algorithms/simulated-annealing.js && node --check public/optimizer/algorithms/genetic-algorithm.js && node --check public/optimizer/algorithms/branch-and-bound.js && node --check public/optimizer/algorithms/constraint-search.js
